## Purpose

Describe the business or operational outcome.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] Changed pages were previewed locally
- [ ] Mobile and desktop behavior were checked when layout changed
- [ ] Links, forms, canonical URLs, redirects, and sitemap were reviewed when relevant
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, account IDs, or customer-sensitive data were added

## Release risk

State the expected production impact and rollback commit.
